option.name: text
option.value: - Kotlin is the preferred language - My project uses the following stuff: - Kotlim Multiplatform - Compose and Material3 for UI code - Jetpack Viewmodels - Kotlin Coroutines and Flows - OpenApiGenertor generation of network APIs from local file - Always follow official architecture recommendations including use of a layered architecture (UDF, View Models, lifecycle-aware UI state collection, etc.)
